name: oh-my-codex-workspace
description: OMX v2, a Codex-native orchestration runtime for OpenAI Codex

scripts.build: npm run build -w @oh-my-codex/core && npm run build -w oh-my-codex && npm run build -w @oh-my-codex/mcp-server && cargo build -p omx-explore
scripts.test: npm run test -w @oh-my-codex/core && npm run test -w oh-my-codex && npm run test -w @oh-my-codex/mcp-server && cargo test -p omx-explore
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @oh-my-codex/core && npm run typecheck -w oh-my-codex && npm run typecheck -w @oh-my-codex/mcp-server
